FarmverseNFTCard.name: FarmverseNFTCard
FarmverseNFTCard.description: Knowledge Card NFTs earned by defeating bosses in Organic Kingdom. AI-generated content + artwork, metadata on IPFS.

FarmversePrayerRecord.description: On-chain prayer records for Vietnamese farmers. Each prayer is an immutable proof stored on Avalanche C-Chain.

MerkleRootStore.description: Anchors IoT sensor data (soil moisture, temperature, humidity) and prayer Merkle roots on-chain for tamper-proof RWA verification.

CoinbaseSmartWalletFactory.description: Coinbase Smart Wallet Factory — creates ERC-4337 account abstraction wallets with passkey (WebAuthn) support.

EntryPoint.description: EIP-4361 EntryPoint v0.6 — canonical ERC-4337 entry point for user operation bundling via Pimlico.

testnet.name: Avalanche Fuji Testnet
testnet.note: Same contracts deployed on Fuji for development/testing
